cities.name: Chennai, India
cities.description: Chennai is a vibrant coastal city known for temples, beaches, classical music, and rich South Indian culture.

cities.name: Jaipur, India
cities.description: Jaipur, the Pink City, offers royal palaces, colorful markets, forts, and cultural travel experiences.

cities.name: Kyoto, Japan
cities.description: Kyoto is famous for peaceful temples, traditional streets, cherry blossoms, and cultural heritage.

cities.name: Tokyo, Japan
cities.description: Tokyo blends modern city life, technology, food, shopping, and traditional Japanese experiences.

cities.name: Sydney, Australia
cities.description: Sydney is known for its iconic harbor, Opera House, beaches, and lively urban culture.

cities.name: Melbourne, Australia
cities.description: Melbourne is loved for coffee culture, arts, laneways, sports, and diverse neighborhoods.

temples.name: Brihadeeswarar Temple, India
temples.description: A UNESCO World Heritage temple in Tamil Nadu, known for its grand architecture and cultural significance.

temples.name: Kiyomizu-dera Temple, Japan
temples.description: A historic Buddhist temple in Kyoto, famous for its wooden stage and scenic city views.

beaches.name: Marina Beach, India
beaches.description: A popular beach in Chennai where visitors enjoy walks, sunrise views, and local snacks.

beaches.name: Bondi Beach, Australia
beaches.description: A world-famous beach in Sydney known for surfing, coastal walks, and ocean views.
